title: MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26
description:
Enjoy an Officially Licensed MLB Baseball Game Anytime, Anywhere

Experience the fully integrated 2026 MLB schedule, and take on the World Series with 2026 Live Cards!

The game now features baseball legends from the National Baseball Hall of Fame—available as brand-new cards!

The game chosen by 2-time National League MVP Bryce Harper, MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26!

■ MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26 Game Features

[NEW]

# Set your Support Team during the regular season and earn a variety of rewards!

# A fierce battle to determine the very best. The Ranked Tournament is back!

# Clubhouse Leader System updated. Select your team's Pitching Leader!

# Expanded player growth. Transcendence expansion and Transcendence Potential update!

[REAL]

# 2026 MLB season schedule, stadiums, and uniforms fully featured!

# 2026 Live Cards that reflect real-time performance!

# Realistic player motions captured with cutting-edge technology!

# Every single call matters. Competition intensifies with the ABS Challenge System!

[PLAY]

# [Quick Play, Spotlight Batting, or Full Play]: Choose how you want to enjoy the game!

# Ranked Slugger: Become the true Home Run King!

# Live Match: Face off against rivals from around the world in real time!

# Club Battle: Join forces with your Club members to challenge the top clubs!

[EASY]

# No more complicated controls! Enjoy simple one-touch play.

# Speed through games with Quick Play and play speed settings!

# Improved tutorials to make the game easier to understand.

# Upgrade system revamp. Check success rates at a glance!

Feel the thrill of baseball action with MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26!
description_short: Take your rivalries to the next level in MLB 9 Innings Rivals 26!
